name: Web Developer
tagline: Craft fast, accessible, beautiful experiences on the open web.
description: From semantic HTML to production front-ends: build the web people love to use.

milestones.title: Semantic HTML & Modern CSS
milestones.learning_goal: Build accessible, responsive layouts with modern CSS.

weekend_project.title: Responsive Portfolio
weekend_project.brief: Ship a fully responsive personal site, no frameworks.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which layout used Grid better than Flexbox?

milestones.title: JavaScript Deep Dive
milestones.learning_goal: Master the language: closures, async, and the DOM.

weekend_project.title: Vanilla SPA
weekend_project.brief: Build a single-page app with no framework.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Where did the event loop surprise you?

milestones.title: Component Frameworks
milestones.learning_goal: Think in components and manage UI state.

weekend_project.title: Dashboard App
weekend_project.brief: Build a data dashboard in a component framework.

milestones.reflection_prompt: What state should have stayed local?

milestones.title: Web Performance

weekend_project.title: Performance Rescue
weekend_project.brief: Take a slow page and make it fast, measured.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which change moved the needle most?

milestones.title: Accessibility & Inclusive Design

weekend_project.title: Accessibility Audit
weekend_project.brief: Audit and fix a real site to WCAG AA.

milestones.reflection_prompt: What broke when you unplugged the mouse?

milestones.title: Full-Stack Integration
milestones.learning_goal: Connect front-end to a real backend and deploy.

weekend_project.title: Full-Stack Product
weekend_project.brief: Ship a full product with auth and a database.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Where did front and back-end assumptions diverge?
